metadata.title: Renaissance Castle Bošany
metadata.description: Renaissance Bošany Castle - a place where history comes back to life. Weddings, conferences, gallery and cultural events.

hero.title: Renaissance Castle Bošany
hero.subtitle: Bošany Castle: Restored Heritage
hero.motto: History should not be preserved. It should be brought back to life.

phoenix.title: 19 years of resilience and restoration
phoenix.description: Drag and reveal the story of rescue.

chronicle.title: Where Maria Theresa Slept
chronicle.subtitle: A story spanning five centuries
chronicle.description: From Turkish raids in the 16th century, through the famous visit of the empress, to complete devastation and rebirth. Bošany Castle is a witness to history that refused to be forgotten.

grant.title: Built against all odds
grant.description: Without state support. From the pure determination of one family.

interior.title: Conferences & Culture
interior.description: Hall for 120 guests, gallery and technical facilities in historical attire.

exterior.title: Weddings & Events
exterior.description: Your day in a Renaissance park, under the castle towers.

park.label: Estate
park.title: Life in the Park
park.description: We are not a museum behind glass. Our park is a promenade for the public and home to our unconventional residents.

cellar.title: Wine Cellar
cellar.description: Discover the history of tanning in the Šmídov family crypt or taste wine in a former prison.

footer.motto: Where history is not preserved, but brought back to life.

newsletter.title: Newsletter
newsletter.description: Subscribe to our newsletter and never miss an event.

footer.copyright: © 2025 Renaissance Castle Bošany. All rights reserved.

metadata.title: History of Bošany Castle | Restoration and Heritage
metadata.description: Five centuries of history of Renaissance Castle Bošany. From Gothic through Renaissance to 17 years of restoration – a story that refused to be forgotten.

hero.title: Castle Story
hero.subtitle: Five centuries of history, 19 years of restoration

philosophy.title: Restoration Philosophy
philosophy.subtitle: Air conditioning designed 400 years ago
philosophy.description: A meter of stone for your perfect comfort. We reject polystyrene and modern insulation. The thick castle walls provide natural climate - pleasant coolness in summer, warmth in winter.

metadata.title: Weddings at Bošany Castle | Wedding Venue Partizánske
metadata.description: Weddings and wedding receptions at Renaissance Castle Bošany near Partizánske. Unique wedding venue in the Partizánske district - polygonal towers, Renaissance park, capacity up to 150 guests.

hero.title: Weddings at Bošany Castle
hero.subtitle: Your big day in Renaissance style - wedding venue Bošany near Partizánske

venue.title: Wedding under the towers - Bošany Castle
venue.description: Renaissance Castle Bošany offers a unique wedding venue near Partizánske. Polygonal towers, historic park and an atmosphere you won't find anywhere else in the region.
venue.location_note: Ideal for weddings from Partizánske, Topoľčany, Prievidza and the entire Upper Nitra region. Castle Bošany - 15 minutes from Partizánske.

mascots.title: Our residents
mascots.description: Alpacas Boška and Rišo, koi pond - our mascots will welcome you.

metadata.title: Bošany Castle Gallery | Photos of Rooms and Interiors
metadata.description: Photo gallery of Renaissance Castle Bošany – interiors, exteriors, conference hall, wine cellar. Discover the spaces near Partizánske.

hero.title: Spaces & Events
hero.subtitle: Photos of spaces and events at the castle

conference.title: Conference Hall
conference.description: Space for 120 people with modern technical equipment hidden in historical visuals.

culture.title: Cultural Events
culture.description: Vernissages, concerts, discussions - supporting the local social scene.

cellar.title: Wine Cellar
cellar.description: Once a prison, now freedom in wine. Unique spaces for tastings and private events.

metadata.title: Contact Castle Bošany | Reservations and Info
metadata.description: Contact Renaissance Castle Bošany – wedding and conference reservations, visits. Address SNP 113/1 Bošany, phone +421 907 726 726.

privacy.intro: Protecting your personal data is important to us. This page explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal data in accordance with the GDPR (General Data Protection Regulation).

gallery_page.label: Photo Gallery
gallery_page.title: Castle Spaces
gallery_page.description: Discover the beauty of the Renaissance castle through the lens. Interiors, exteriors and the atmosphere of history.
